GYEON Q2M Fabric Alcantara Cleaner 1L

Brand: Gyeon
Price: $25.00 CAD
Barcode: 8809432677758

Fabric Upholstery Cleaner
An exceptionally powerful yet safe fabric cleaner, designed to effectively and safely remove dirt, stains, and odors from all types of fabrics. Leaves a clean, fresh finish for protection with Gyeon FabricCoat.

One Step fabric cleaner:
It can serve as a one-step cleaner when used with the Gyeon Leather brush and Gyeon Baldwipe microfiber towels. Alternatively, it proves effective as a pre-spray for wet cleaning with an extraction vacuum cleaner. This versatile cleaner not only cleanses and removes light stains but also prepares textiles for coating protection with Gyeon FabricCoat. It is suitable for use on Alcantara, carpet, soft convertible tops, headliners, and fabric home furniture as well.

Clean Fabric in 3 simple steps:
Spray liberally on the surface, agitate with Q2M LeatherBrush in a circular motion, and wipe the residue with Q2M BaldWipe. Repeat if necessary. In the case of light contamination, spray on a microfiber and wipe. Remember, It can also be used on Alcantara and other fabric surfaces.
TIP: For heavy dirt, agitate Q2M Fabric Cleaner with a brush and remove with an extraction vacuum cleaner.

Description:

GYEON Fabric Cleaner 1L

DEEP CLEAN FOR FABRIC
A powerful solution to clean fabric upholstery. Its formula has been designed to remove dirt, stains and odour effectively and safely on all types of fabrics. It will leave the interior fresh, clean and ready for protection with Q2 FabricCoat.

CLEANS & PREPARES
Q2M FabricCleaner might be used as a one-step cleaner (via brush and microfibre) or as an effective pre-spray for wet cleaning with an extraction vacuum cleaner. It cleanses but also prepares textiles prior to coating with Q2 FabricCoat.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN
Spray liberally on the surface. Agitate with Q2M LeatherBrush in circular motion. Wipe the residue with Q2M BaldWipe. Repeat if necessary. In case of light contamination, spray on a microfibre and wipe. TIP: On heavy dirt agitate Q2M Fabric Cleaner with a brush and remove with an extraction vacuum cleaner.

FAQ:

Q: Can I use an all-purpose cleaner instead of Fabric Cleaner?
A: Yes, you can use APC to clean fabric surfaces, but it may not be as safe and efficient due to its high pH level. Incomplete extraction may result in leaving caustic chemicals behind in the carpeting and fabric. This is not a problem with dedicated fabric cleaners.

Q: Does it remove stains and odor?
A: Yes, it is formulated to effectively and safely remove dirt, stains, and odors on all types of fabrics. Repeat the cleaning process for heavier stains if needed.

Q: Can it be used on Alcantara/Soft Convertible Top/Headliner/Carpet?
A: Yes, it is safe to use on any fabric surfaces.

Gyeon Q2M Fabric Cleaner 1L

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 116120
Price: $29.99 AUD (Tax included)

Description:
A powerful solution to clean fabric upholstery. Its formula has been designed to remove dirt, stains and odor effectively and safely on all types of fabrics. It will leave the interior fresh, clean and ready for protection with Q2 FabricCoat.

Q2M FabricCleaner might be used as a one-step cleaner (via brush and microfiber) or as an effective pre-spray for wet cleaning with an extraction vacuum cleaner. It cleanses but also prepares textiles prior to coating with Q2 FabricCoat.

Features and Benefits:
- Powerful cleaning formula that removes even the toughest stains
- Safe and effective on all types of fabric, including delicate textiles
- Easy to use, with no residue or odor left behind
- Leaves surfaces looking clean and refreshed

Gyeon Q2M Fabric Cleaner is the ultimate solution for maintaining your vehicle's interior fabrics. This powerful cleaner is specially formulated to remove even the toughest dirt and stains, leaving your carpets, upholstery, and mats looking clean and refreshed.

What sets Gyeon Q2M Fabric Cleaner apart is its versatility. This cleaner is safe and effective on all types of fabric, including delicate textiles such as Alcantara. Unlike other fabric cleaners that can leave a residue or odor behind, Gyeon Q2M Fabric Cleaner leaves no trace after cleaning.

Gyeon Q2M FabricCleaner's long-lasting formula helps prevent future dirt and stains from sticking to the fabric, ensuring that your vehicle's interior remains looking clean for longer.

How To Use:

Step 1: Preparation
First, remove any loose dirt or debris from the surface you wish to clean. If the fabric is particularly dirty, you may want to vacuum it first to remove any large particles.

Step 2: Application
Spray the Gyeon Q2M Fabric Cleaner directly onto the fabric, ensuring an even coverage. For tough stains, you may need to apply a little more product and agitate the area with a soft-bristled brush or microfiber towel.

Step 3: Agitation
Using a soft-bristled brush or microfiber towel, gently agitate the cleaner into the fabric. Pay particular attention to any areas that are heavily soiled or stained. Allow the cleaner to penetrate the fabric for a few minutes.

Step 4: Extraction
Using a wet/dry vacuum or a damp microfiber towel, extract the cleaner from the fabric. Ensure that you remove all the cleaner to prevent any residue from drying onto the fabric.

Step 5: Drying
Allow the fabric to dry completely before using it again. You can speed up the drying process by using a fan or opening a window to allow air to circulate.

Description:
GYEON Q2M Fabric Cleaner 1L

GYEON is a leading innovator in premium automotive detailing products, trusted by professional detailers and enthusiasts worldwide for delivering exceptional cleaning power and surface protection. Every product in the GYEON range is crafted using advanced chemical engineering to ensure superior results while maintaining the highest safety standards for your vehicle surfaces. With a focus on efficiency, performance, and ease of use, GYEON products are designed to help you achieve and maintain a pristine, showroom-quality finish inside and out.

Key Features:
- Powerful fabric cleaning solution: A powerful solution to clean fabric upholstery, tackling even the most stubborn dirt and grime.
- Advanced stain and odour removal: Its formula has been designed to remove dirt, stains and odour effectively and safely on all types of fabrics.
- Safe on all fabric types: Suitable for cloth seats, carpets, floor mats, door trims, and other fabric components without causing damage or discolouration.
- Fresh and clean finish: It will leave the interior fresh, clean and ready for protection with Q2 FabricCoat.
- Preparation for long-lasting protection: Optimises the surface for maximum bonding of GYEON Q2 FabricCoat, ensuring extended resistance against spills and soiling.
- Professional results made easy: Delivers detailing-grade results with simple application, perfect for both professionals and DIY car care enthusiasts.

Keeping your car interior fabrics clean is essential for both appearance and comfort. GYEON Q2M Fabric Cleaner 1L offers a safe yet highly effective way to maintain your upholstery, removing contaminants while leaving a fresh, odour-free finish. Used alone or as a preparation step for Q2 FabricCoat, it an indispensable tool for preserving your interior beauty and longevity.

Specifications:
Size: 1L
Brand: GYEON
Suitable For: All Fabric Types
Formula: Odour and Stain Remover

Q2M FABRICCLEANER

Category: Interior / maintenance

Effective cleaner for automotive fabrics and textiles.

Q2M FabricCleaner is a dedicated cleaner developed for automotive fabrics and textile surfaces. It removes dirt, stains and everyday contamination from seats, carpets and fabric trim while remaining safe for regular use.

Strong and effective textile cleaner and pre-spray.
Q2M FabricCleaner helps restore the clean appearance of fabric surfaces by lifting embedded dirt and grime. It prepares textiles for further protection while keeping the material fresh and free from residues.

Key Benefits:
- NO FOAM
- STRONG CLEANING ACTION
- FOR ALL TEXTILES

What makes Q2M FABRICCLEANER so special?
- Removes dirt and stains from fabric surfaces
- Prepares fabrics for protection if required

TECHNICAL DETAILS:
Capacities: 1000 ML

HOW TO USE:
01. Vacuum the fabric surface before application.
02. Spray Q2M FabricCleaner onto the surface or a brush.
03. Agitate gently to loosen contamination.
04. Wipe or extract residue using a clean towel.
05. Allow the surface to dry completely.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

Q: What surfaces can Q2M FabricCleaner be used on?
A: Seats, carpets and automotive fabric trim.

Q: Is it safe for regular use?
A: Yes. It is suitable for routine fabric maintenance.

Q: Does it leave residue behind?
A: No. It cleans without leaving residue.

Q: Should fabric be vacuumed first?
A: Yes. Removing loose dirt improves results.

Q: Can it be used before applying FabricCoat?
A: Yes. It prepares fabrics for protection.
